languages.text: {n}Уродливый лик Тервантьяса кривится в гримасе презрения.{/n} "Образец с нарушением когнитивных способностей? Когда его доставили сюда, он проявил... строптивость. Техноманиакальные наклонности его граничат с психозом, что, вероятно, резко снизило тягу к выживанию и спровоцировало припадок бредовых идей величия".

{n}Tervantias's hideous visage twists into a sneer of contempt.{/n} "The specimen with impaired cognitive abilities? When he was brought here, he displayed... a lack of docility. His technomaniacal tendencies border on psychosis, which likely severely reduced his will to survive and provoked a bout of delusional grandeur."
languages.original_text: {n}Уродливый лик Тервантьяса кривится в гримасе презрения.{/n} "Образец с нарушением когнитивных способностей? Когда его доставили сюда, он проявил... строптивость. Техноманиакальные наклонности его граничат с психозом, что, вероятно, резко снизило тягу к выживанию и спровоцировало припадок бредовых идей величия".

Its technomaniacal tendencies border on psychosis, which likely greatly reduced its will to survive and provoked a bout of delusional grandeur."

His technomaniacal tendencies border on psychosis, which likely severely reduced his will to survive and provoked a bout of delusional grandeur."

{n}Tervantias's hideous visage twists into a sneer of contempt.{/n} "The specimen with impaired cognitive abilities? When he was brought here, he displayed... a lack of docility. His technomaniacal tendencies border on psychosis, which likely severely reduced his will to survive and provoked a bout of delusional grandeur."

languages.text: {n}Tervantias verzieht sein scheußliches Gesicht zu einem verächtlichen Grinsen.{/n} "Das Versuchsstück mit den gestörten kognitiven Fähigkeiten? Als es hergebracht wurde, mangelte es ihm an ... Fügsamkeit. Seine technomanischen Neigungen grenzen an eine Psychose, die offenbar seinen Überlebenswillen mindert und Allmachtsfantasien in ihm ausgelöst hat."
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's hideous visage twists into a sneer of contempt.{/n} "The specimen with impaired cognitive abilities? When he was brought here, he displayed... a lack of docility. His technomaniacal tendencies border on psychosis, which likely severely reduced his will to survive and provoked a bout of delusional grandeur."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias verzieht sein scheußliches Gesicht zu einem verächtlichen Grinsen.{/n} "Das Versuchsstück mit den gestörten kognitiven Fähigkeiten? Als es hergebracht wurde, mangelte es ihm an ... Fügsamkeit. Seine technomanischen Neigungen grenzen an eine Psychose, die offenbar seinen Überlebenswillen mindert und Allmachtsfantasien in ihm ausgelöst hat."

languages.text: {n}Le visage hideux de Tervantias se fait hautain.{/n} « Le spécimen aux capacités cognitives altérées ? À son arrivée, il manquait de... docilité. Ses tendances technomaniaques frôlent la psychose, ce qui a eu pour conséquence de provoquer un délire de grandeur et de réduire grandement sa volonté de survivre. »
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's hideous visage twists into a sneer of contempt.{/n} "The specimen with impaired cognitive abilities? When he was brought here, he displayed... a lack of docility. His technomaniacal tendencies border on psychosis, which likely severely reduced his will to survive and provoked a bout of delusional grandeur."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage hideux de Tervantias se fait hautain.{/n} « Le spécimen aux capacités cognitives altérées ? À son arrivée, il manquait de... docilité. Ses tendances technomaniaques frôlent la psychose, ce qui a eu pour conséquence de provoquer un délire de grandeur et de réduire grandement sa volonté de survivre. »

languages.text: {n}La espantosa cara de Tervantias se retuerce en una mueca de desprecio.{/n} «¿El espécimen con habilidades cognitivas dañadas? Cuando lo trajeron aquí, mostraba una... carencia de docilidad. Sus tendencias tecnomaníacas rozaban la psicosis, lo que probablemente redujera en gran medida su voluntad de vivir y provocara brotes de delirios de grandeza».
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's hideous visage twists into a sneer of contempt.{/n} "The specimen with impaired cognitive abilities? When he was brought here, he displayed... a lack of docility. His technomaniacal tendencies border on psychosis, which likely severely reduced his will to survive and provoked a bout of delusional grandeur."

traits.locale_text: {n}La espantosa cara de Tervantias se retuerce en una mueca de desprecio.{/n} «¿El espécimen con habilidades cognitivas dañadas? Cuando lo trajeron aquí, mostraba una... carencia de docilidad. Sus tendencias tecnomaníacas rozaban la psicosis, lo que probablemente redujera en gran medida su voluntad de vivir y provocara brotes de delirios de grandeza».

languages.text: {n}Tervantias'ın iğrenç yüzü, küçümseyici bir sırıtışla buruşuyor.{/n} "Bilişsel yetenekleri bozuk olan numune mi? Buraya getirildiğinde... Uysallık eksikliği sergiledi. Teknomanyakça eğilimleri psikoz sınırlarında, bu da muhtemelen hayatta kalma isteğini ciddi şekilde azalttı ve sanrısal bir büyüklük krizine neden oldu."
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's hideous visage twists into a sneer of contempt.{/n} "The specimen with impaired cognitive abilities? When he was brought here, he displayed... a lack of docility. His technomaniacal tendencies border on psychosis, which likely severely reduced his will to survive and provoked a bout of delusional grandeur."

Teknomanyakça eğilimleri psikoz sınırlarında, bu da muhtemelen hayatta kalma isteğini ciddi şekilde azalttı ve sanrısal bir büyüklük krizine neden oldu."

languages.text: {n}特万提亚斯那可怖的脸挤出一抹轻蔑的冷笑。{/n}“那个认知能力受损的样本？它被送来时，表现得……很不顺从。它对技术的狂热近乎于精神错乱，恐怕也因此严重削弱了它的求生意志，还引发了一阵自大妄想。”
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's hideous visage twists into a sneer of contempt.{/n} "The specimen with impaired cognitive abilities? When he was brought here, he displayed... a lack of docility. His technomaniacal tendencies border on psychosis, which likely severely reduced his will to survive and provoked a bout of delusional grandeur."

traits.locale_text: {n}特万提亚斯那可怖的脸挤出一抹轻蔑的冷笑。{/n}“那个认知能力受损的样本？它被送来时，表现得……很不顺从。它对技术的狂热近乎于精神错乱，恐怕也因此严重削弱了它的求生意志，还引发了一阵自大妄想。”

languages.text: {n}テルヴァントイアの醜い顔は、嘲笑に歪む。「認知能力が低下した標本？彼が連れてこられた時、彼は...従順さを欠いていた。彼のテクノマニアは精神病に近いが、生存意欲を著しく低下させ、妄想の盛んな状態に陥ったのだ。」{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias's hideous visage twists into a sneer of contempt.{/n} "The specimen with impaired cognitive abilities? When he was brought here, he displayed... a lack of docility. His technomaniacal tendencies border on psychosis, which likely severely reduced his will to survive and provoked a bout of delusional grandeur."
